instruction: Fix the color of the arrow mark on this anchor icon — it's the wrong shade (very dark gray).
initial_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/anchor.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><circle cx="12" cy="5" r="3"/><line x1="12" y1="22" x2="12" y2="8"/><path d="M5 12H2a10 10 0 0 0 20 0h-3"/></g>
  <polyline id="arrow" fill="none" stroke="#1a1a1a" stroke-width="2" fill="none" points="100,100 112,112 108,104 112,112 104,108" />
</svg>
target_svg:
<svg xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" viewBox="0 0 128 128" width="128" height="128">
<rect id="__bg" x="0" y="0" width="128" height="128" fill="white" />
  <g id="icon" data-source="feather/anchor.svg" transform="translate(8, 8) scale(4.6667)" style="color: #222" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round" stroke-width="1.5"><circle cx="12" cy="5" r="3"/><line x1="12" y1="22" x2="12" y2="8"/><path d="M5 12H2a10 10 0 0 0 20 0h-3"/></g>
  <polyline id="arrow" fill="none" stroke="#222" stroke-width="2" fill="none" points="100,100 112,112 108,104 112,112 104,108" />
</svg>
